entry.title: Socialist Humanism: The Struggle for LGBTQ+ Equality in Vietnam
entry.summary:
Vietnam has a vibrant and visible LGBTQ+ community which has made great progress in advancing equality in our socialist society. However, there are still many challenges to be overcome before Vietnam reaches its full potential in fulfilling the mission of socialist humanism. In this video, I share a speech I gave to a meeting of the Communist Party of Norway covering the topic of "Queer Marxism."
NOTE: The full event from the Communist Party of Norway has not yet been posted to YouTube, however, I will post it in the pinned comment below as soon as it becomes available.
Half the Sky Podcast: https://www.instagram.com/halftheskypod/

entry.title: Vietnam's Dangerous Relationship with Israel.
entry.summary:
This video explores the painful truth about Israeli influence in Vietnam.

entry.title: Vietnam's Textbook Privatization Disaster
entry.summary:
School textbooks are a vital social institution for a socialist nation. Since the 1950s, Vietnam has had several textbook reforms, with varying degrees of success. Unfortunately, in 2013, Vietnam privatized the writing and publishing of school textbooks, leading to severe problems. In this video, we examine the catastrophic failure of textbook privatization in Vietnam.
--------------------------------------------------------
SUPPORT LUNA OI: Our Free Ebooks and Merch: http://www.banyanhouse.org/shop

entry.title: Agent Orange: A War Crime Without End in Vietnam
entry.summary:
For five decades, Vietnam has been struggling with the aftermath of Agent Orange. This was one of the worst war crimes ever committed by the USA, causing harm to generations of innocent Vietnamese as well as descendants of American war veterans. This video details the cost of this horrible toxin as well as efforts made by Vietnamese communists to care for victims.
SUPPORT LUNA OI: Our Free Ebooks and Merch: http://www.banyanhouse.org/shop

entry.title: Cambodia and Thailand Once Again on Brink of War
entry.summary:
The short-lived peace treaty between Cambodia and Thailand has been broken and Southeast Asia is once again on the brink of war. This video offers an update from our last video on the conflict between Cambodia and Thailand and discusses the international relations which both nations share, all from a class conscious perspective.
Our Previous Video on Conflict Between Thailand and Cambodia: https://youtu.be/AXFDyCV1NUA/
My Video on the Khmer Rouge in Cambodia: https://youtu.be/SsgjRE2wSmE?si=HTpi9e24BJDYU3kS
NonCompete Travel Warning on Visiting the USA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GPcCYgyPJ0k/

entry.title: Here's How Vietnam has ELIMINATED Low Quality Housing!
entry.summary:
Vietnam has just completed repairing and replacing all low quality housing five years ahead of schedule. Now, in response to disastrous flooding, Vietnamese people are quick to work fixing and replacing homes that were damaged and destroyed. By the end of this decade, Vietnam will eliminate poverty altogether according to a multidimensional index. Here is how the Socialist Republic of Vietnam is dealing with poverty and low quality housing!
My Video on Typhoon Recovery: https://youtu.be/2XBgI4AmKuY/
------------------------------ Learn About Our Revolutionary Guide and Donate: https://www.banyanhouse.org/revolutionaryguide/
Find our free ebooks and print copies here: http://www.banyanhouse.org/shop

entry.title: Vietnam's Government has DECENTRALIZED! What does it mean for the people?
entry.summary:
Vietnam's government is now going through its most major changes since the end of the war against the USA in 1975. In a major overhaul, the government is completely eliminating the District level of administration in an effort to drastically cut bureaucracy. In this video, we explain how and why the government is making these changes and reflect on historical reasons for the old system as we make way for the new!
Support Midnight Books: https://www.midnightbooks562.com/ https://www.instagram.com/midnightbooksla/

entry.title: How to Think Like a Vietnamese Communist: Historical Materialism
entry.summary:
In this video, we discuss the Marxist-Leninist philosophy of Historical Materialism, its basis in Dialectical Materialist philosophy, and an overview of the concepts which Marx developed to explain the role of the working class in history!
Part 1: https://youtu.be/neI-ol2AowM Part 2: https://youtu.be/kzWEXaznMg0 Part 3: https://youtu.be/FwZyBuf1h5I

entry.title: Are Cambodia and Thailand heading for WAR?
entry.summary:
Cambodia and Thailand are on the brink of war. To many in the West, this comes as a surprise, but here in Southeast Asia we have been watching events unfold for months. This is the full history and political explanation of the conflict. Let's all hope and struggle for PEACE!
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: How Young Communists Organize in Vietnam
entry.summary:
Vietnam's Youth Union was founded in 1931 by Ho Chi Minh. For 94 years, the Union has given young Vietnamese people the opportunity to serve and defend the freedom and independence of our country. This is one of countless stories about Youth Unionists serving their community through volunteer work in the spirit of Uncle Ho!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- My FREE EBOOK: http://www.banyanhouse.org/shop

entry.summary:

entry.summary:

entry.title: BIGGEST Communist Celebration in Vietnamese HISTORY!
entry.summary:
Over 13,000 people marched in the Grand Parade celebrating 50 years of unification of Vietnam. Come join us as we review the parade and look back at 50 years of socialist struggle and accomplishments since the heroic heroes of Vietnam won against imperialist oppression!

entry.title: Vietnam’s Secret Weapon Against US Tariffs: Smart Diplomacy!
entry.summary:
In this follow up video, we look at more of the rapid progress Vietnam has been making forging diplomatic ties with a broad range of nations and regions, including China, Brazil, Ethiopia, and even the EU. We also discuss some of the chauvinist reactions we've been seeing from Western liberals who seem to want nothing more than to see Vietnam fail in this era of instability an chaos brought on by Trump's on-again/off-again tariffs.

entry.title: Vietnam's Rapid Response to Trump's Tariffs
entry.summary:
Vietnam has proven to be resilient and resourceful in response to crises. Now that the global trade war has begun, it's time for the people of Vietnam to once again stand up and work together to solve the problems of the day. In this video, Luna Nguyen outlines some of the ways in which Vietnam is already planning and responding to this emerging crisis.

entry.title: How Australia supported FASCISM in the Vietnam War
entry.summary:
Why did Australia enter in the Vietnam War? What war crimes did Australian troops commit against Vietnamese civilians? In this video, we will unveil the true intention of Australia and reveal their forgotten atrocities in the war against Vietnam.

entry.title: An Urgent Message to Europe From Vietnam.
entry.summary:
Europe today stands at a crossroads. Will you follow the path of American imperialism which has led you to so much betrayal and instability? Or will you join the international community of nations on equal terms? In this video, Luna Nguyen extends a hand of friendship to the working people of Europe.

entry.title: Vietnam defeated fascism. So can YOU!
entry.summary:
This video discusses the rise and fall of the fascist puppet regime which occupied and brutalized the South of Vietnam from 1954 until 1975. We learn how Vietnamese communists resisted, protested, and struggled against fascism under desperate and dangerous conditions and ultimately overthrew fascism and imperialism once and for all.
MY FREE EBOOK: Curriculumn of the basic principles of Marxism-Leninism: http://www.banyanhouse.org/shop

entry.title: Why Culture Matters to the Oppressed
entry.summary:
In this video, we discuss the importance of culture in the fight against capitalist oppression and why imperialist and colonial powers have tried to eradicate culture of oppressed peoples throughout history. We also discuss the base and superstructure of society and how they relate to one another in a revolutionary context.
Save 10%-20% on MeansTV using my code LUNA: https://means.tv/orders/customer_info?o=70845&d=LUNA

entry.title: Socialist Farming in Vietnam
entry.summary:
How does farming work in Vietnam? I grew up on a collectivized farming coop in Vietnam, so I'm the perfect person to tell you! Find out all about how industrialized farming works in a socialist economy!
Curriculumn of the basic principles of Marxism-Leninism: http://www.banyanhouse.org/shop
Land Reform in Vietnam: https://youtu.be/vneV-ATS1XE?si=21fb6xAwWpja8_Ln

entry.title: Revolutionary Optimism and Student Protests: from Vietnam to Palestine!
entry.summary:
This is my message to protesters in the USA and the imperial core. Please keep standing up against empire!
My mother’s story as a victim of the US war crimes: https://youtu.be/x5xaWssOB4A?si=9Ebnqod5KsI-bVBD
My childhood memories about growing up under the US embargoes: https://youtu.be/-Fdv4xBSLjw?si=AJbhkfIi2eadL3_S
Revolutionary Optimism: https://youtu.be/XO_FXkxJVj4?si=kVEHvLn9aPHriYBn

entry.title: Do Vietnamese Love Capitalism? Here's why you can't trust Pew Research Center
entry.summary:
Almost every day, some jerk sends me the same 10-year-old chart from Pew Research Center which they claim proves that Vietnamese love capitalism. It comes from Pew Research, and after I did some digging, I found out that it's total BS and capitalist propaganda.
So, what is Pew Research Center? Who is behind it?
In this video today, I will debunk the infamous chart from Pew Research Center claiming that 95% of Vietnamese “support the free market.”
Watch me debunking other Western media outlets: Propaganda, Vietnam and the CIA: https://youtu.be/byDXAI2pWdI?si=KjrVChvUkD0uRupa
Fake news from fake joitnalists: https://youtu.be/b666vCuVJIA?si=vSXGqx_h6P4cu-Qv
Is Vietnam a police state?!: https://youtu.be/EQCpn305vUk?si=0o5J0aAzmMVl6MPW
Vietnam Land Reform: https://youtu.be/vneV-ATS1XE?si=8Z9Ya5jB2JvIkmgI
Vietnam’s Labor Law:
https://youtu.be/oMlyA3VWdsw?si=bzf9i1hyNW7ALx7k
Is Vietnam socialist?
https://youtu.be/mMubOw5H-yo?si=aTR7eDCRSS3VqhJg
"Curriculum of the basic principles of Marxism-Leninism" link: https://www.banyanhouse.org/shop/

entry.title: Did Vietnam ALLY with the USA against China?
entry.summary:
On September 10th, 2023, Vietnam and the US upgraded their relationship to "Comprehensive Strategic Partnership for Peace, Cooperation and Stable Development."
What is the meaning for this upgrade?
Is Vietnam siding with the US against China?
This video will answer those questions and explain Vietnam's official defense policy.
"Curriculum of the basic principles of Marxism-Leninism" link: https://www.banyanhouse.org/shop/

entry.title: CIA in Vietnam: Lecture and Book Talk With Luna Oi and NonCompete
entry.summary:
Luna Oi is a Vietnamese communist educator, content creator, and translator currently working on a translation of the Vietnamese curriculum of Marxism-Leninism. The curriculum is available NOW at Midnight Books, and the ebook is available at BanyanHouse.org/shop
Midnight Books is a revolutionary bookstore and community space in Whittier, California. Midnight has served the community with radical texts, poetry, arts, and political education. Visit them online on instagram at @midnightbooksla.
All Power Books is a revolutionary bookstore and community space on West Adams in South Los Angeles. All Power serves the community with political education, a Free Clinic, Saturday grocery distributions and more. Visit them online at @allpowerbooks on instagram.
Both spaces survive off your support! Buy a book, make a donation and keep socialist spaces alive.

entry.title: Communist War Heroes Remembered - INTERVIEW with a Vietnamese Combat Veteran
entry.summary:
July 27th is Vietnam's Day of War Invalids and Martyrs. On this day, me and comrades from the Ho Chi Minh Communist Youth Union went to a martyr cemetery to commemorate our fallen comrades. We had an amazing conversation with an actual communist veteran who was in the Vietnam war. #vietnamwarmusic #Vietnam #VietnamHistory #history
"Curriculum of the basic principles of Marxism-Leninism" link: https://www.banyanhouse.org/shop/

entry.title: What did LENIN say about DEMOCRACY? | Democratic Centralism Series
entry.summary:
What did Lenin think about democracy? How does this pertain to the modern socialist framework of democratic centralism?
Today, in part 3 of our Democratic Centralism series, we will explore the contribution that Lenin made in formulating the philosophy of democratic centralism and how it was practiced in the USSR!
Part 1: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4YVcQe4wceY&t=0s Part 2: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jI8CgACBOcQ

entry.title: A Vietnam War Movie from North Vietnam | Interview with DSA International Committee
entry.summary:
In this interview with the DSA International Committee, Luna Nguyen introduces "The Little Girl of Hanoi," a remarkable Vietnamese film shot just 6 months after the Christmas bombing of Hanoi. Luna also discusses the Vietnamese perspective of the war and how Vietnamese feel today about American Vietnam veterans and the state of the USA empire in our modern era from a Vietnamese perspective.
Editing and End Credit Song by Noam Bergman: https://www.youtube.com/hilightnotes
Watch the full interview, which includes the full unedited film here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pBsloYK6sqI

entry.title: How Ho Chi Minh confronted USA HYPOCRISY with Vietnam's Declaration of Independence
entry.summary:
This video explains how Ho Chi Minh wrote poetry into the pages of history with his clever development of Vietnam's declaration of independence, which forced the USA to confront its own hypocrisy on the world stage.

entry.title: What did Karl Marx think about democracy?
entry.summary:
What did Karl Marx and Friedrich Engels think about democracy? How does this pertain to the modern socialist framework of democratic centralism?
Today, in part 2 of our Democratic Centralism series, we will explore the origins of democratic centralism in the philosophy and practice of Karl Marx and Friedrich Engels.

entry.title: How the USA and China backed the Atrocities of Pol Pot and the Khmer Rouge
entry.summary:
The history of Pol Pot and the Khmer Rouge is a tragic tale of loss, betrayal, and hardhsip for millions of Cambodian and Vietnamese people. In this video, I tell the story of Vietnam's war against the Khmer Rouge and the little-known history of the Sino-Vietnam war from a Vietnamese perspective.
-----------------------------
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/
Merch: https://www.lunaoi.com/shop/
-----------------------------
References:
Part 1: https://youtu.be/f4-GYxZ_9Pw Hanoi Metro: https://youtu.be/OQNjClGgKi4 Nationalism: https://youtu.be/CkbSYIyzmF0
"Second Life, Second Death: The Khmer Rouge After 1978" - Kelvin Rowley: https://www.files.ethz.ch/isn/46657/GS24.pdf
Vietnam's war against the Khmer Rouge: https://www.qdnd.vn/40nam-chien-thang-chien-tranh-bao-ve-bien-gioi-tay-nam/phan-tich-binh-luan/cuoc-chien-vi-chinh-nghia-559883
Crimes against humanity of the Khmer Rouge: https://www.qdnd.vn/40nam-chien-thang-chien-tranh-bao-ve-bien-gioi-tay-nam/su-kien-nhan-chung/toi-ac-tay-troi-cua-tap-doan-pol-pot-gay-ra-cho-viet-nam-559461
Beijing's role in the rise of Pol Pot: https://viettimes.vn/nhan-dien-vai-tro-cua-bac-kinh-trong-chien-tranh-bien-gioi-tay-nam-post116206.html
Border war between Vietnam and Cambodia: http://baoquankhu5.vn/chien-tranh-bien-gioi-tay-nam-la-cuoc-chien-ve-quoc-lon-cua-dan-toc/
Border war between Vietnam and China: https://vietnamnet.vn/chien-tranh-bien-gioi-nhin-lai-de-tran-quy-nen-hoa-binh-hien-tai-816067.html
A Lesson in Foreign Policy - When China taught Vietnam a Lesson with US Support: https://tamilnation.org/intframe/850901lesson.htm
Ba Chuc Massacre: https://vnexpress.net/hon-3-000-dan-ba-chuc-bi-pol-pot-tham-sat-trong-ky-uc-nguoi-song-sot-3864732.html
Tong Chup Massacre: https://kienthuc.net.vn/xa-hoi/ky-uc-1721979-tham-sat-tong-chup-noi-dau-con-am-anh-1184158.html
Vietnam - China relations: https://cand.com.vn/Van-de-hom-nay-thoi-su/Quan-he-Viet-Nam-Trung-Quoc-Gac-lai-qua-khu-huong-den-tuong-lai-i510769/
In the Dock With Pol Pot: Uncle Sam: https://www.latimes.com/archives/la-xpm-1997-06-24-me-6271-story.html
Genocides in Cambodia and Sri Lanka: https://sangam.org/genocides-cambodia-sri-lanka/
How Thatcher gave Pol Pot a hand: https://www.newstatesman.com/politics/2000/04/how-thatcher-gave-pol-pot-a-hand
Rice, Rivalry, and Politics: MANAGING CAMBODIAN RELIEF by Linda Mason and Roger Brown: https://carnegiecouncil-media.storage.googleapis.com/files/v27_i001_a005.pdf
The Friends of Pol Pot: https://msuweb.montclair.edu/~furrg/pol/pilgernationpolpot.html
British SAS trained Khmer Rouge in land mines: https://www.cambridgeclarion.org/books/1.html
Singapore admits it supported Pol Pot: https://vtc.vn/bao-singapore-thua-nhan-nuoc-nay-da-ung-ho-che-do-diet-chung-khmer-do-ar479173.html
The Events of 1978 in Vietnamese Diplomacy: Analyses and Lessons for Today's Small-to-Medium Sized Countries: https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/03068374.2021.1907980
Decode the Khmer Rouge's paranoia about Vietnam: http://redsvn.net/giai-ma-hoang-tuong-cua-khmer-do-ve-viet-nam2/

entry.title: The Myth of "a Bunch of Simple Farmers" in the Vietnam War
entry.summary:
This is a collaboration video with Jeremy from Interventiones Gringas! In this video, we talk about Project 100k in the Vietnam war and debunk the myth: "It's just rice farmers that won the war against the USA."
Subscribe to Intervenciones Gringas! https://www.youtube.com/@IntervencionesGringas
Link to original video in Spanish: https://youtu.be/E_lEz5Xqzsw

entry.title: The CIA Executed Che Guevara in Cold Blood (and LIED About It)
entry.summary:
55 years ago, the CIA tracked down Ernesto "Che" Guevara and took his life in cold blood. This video, based on an article from The International Magazine by Martha Grevatt, tells the story of Che's life - and the tragic crime of his death.
Subscribe to The International magazine: https://internationalmagz.com/magazine
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/

entry.title: Super Storm Disaster Relief: SOCIALISM vs. CAPITALISM
entry.summary:
The US, Vietnam and Cuba were hit by category 4 hurricane and typhoon at the same time but the way Vietnam and Cuba deal with the natural disaster is very different from the US.
In the video today, we will discuss about these differences.
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/
Merch: https://www.lunaoi.com/shop/

entry.title: DEMOCRATIC CENTRALISM - how Socialists make decisions!
entry.summary:
What is Democratic Centralism? This philosophy, formulated by Marx, Engels, and Lenin, allows groups to make decisions collectively - giving everyone a voice while maintaining harmony and unity in thought and action.
Today, in part 1, we will learn what Democratic Centralism means and why we should apply it in our real life organizing.
Videos on Dialectical Materialism: Part 1: https://youtu.be/neI-ol2AowM Part 2: https://youtu.be/kzWEXaznMg0 Part 3: https://youtu.be/FwZyBuf1h5I
Videos on Doi Moi Reforms: Part 1: https://youtu.be/x5xaWssOB4A Part 2: https://youtu.be/TjfAFc7_SH4
Video on Land Reforms: https://youtu.be/vneV-ATS1XE
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/

entry.title: Vietnam War Memories from the Communist Side
entry.summary:
Until now most English language accounts of the so-called "Vietnam War" focus on the American perspective, produced by American filmmakers, and otherwise drowning out the voices of Vietnamese communists who sacrificed so much for freedom, independence, and self-determination for their homelands. In this video, we take a look at some stories from the Vietnamese communist perspective about what we ourselves call the Resistance War Against American Imperialism.
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/

entry.title: How Vietnam Kicked COVID's BUTT! [ Luna Oi! Presentation for PSL ]
entry.summary:
On July 8, 2022, PSL Sacramento invited me to give this presentation for their virtual forum on Vietnam’s response to COVID-19.

entry.title: Riding the World's Best electric motorbikes in Vietnam
entry.summary:
Vietnam is leading the world in electric motorcycle technology. Today we take a test ride on two contenders for the world's best motorbike: Dat Bike, a scrappy upstart that makes rough and ready minimalist motorcycles, vs. VinFast, Vietnam's largest corporation cranking out high tech slick style.
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/

entry.title: How Socialist Vietnam is dealing with GAS PRICE?
entry.summary:
Petroleum prices are reaching new peaks everyday all over the world. Vietnamese people are being terribly affected by this.
The Vietnam government is facing a huge trouble right now looking for solutions to help the people and save the economy.
This video will present to you how a socialist oriented market economy like Vietnam is dealing with this situation.
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/

entry.title: Hanoi has a new METRO SYSTEM and it's AWESOME!
entry.summary:
This year, Hanoi's brand new Metro System started operating and it's really great! This is Vietnam's very first metro line, and it will definitely make life easier for thousands of Hanoians! Learn about the new trains, as well as electric buses which are clean, comfortable, and made right here in Vietnam!
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/
Merch: https://www.lunaoi.com/shop/

entry.title: Saying Goodbye to one of Vietnam's Oldest Comrades - Rest in Peace, Hoang Thi Khin!
entry.summary:
Comrade Hoang Thi Khin joined Vietnam's socialist revolution in 1941 when she was just 21 years old. She struggled alongside Ho Chi Minh and helped secure peace and freedom for her village and for all of Vietnam. She just passed away at the age of 102 years old. In this video, we share her story and say goodbye.
Support me on Comradery, an Anti-Capitalist Alternative to Patreon: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
Support me on Patreon, a dirty capitalist alternative to Comradery: https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/
Merch: https://www.lunaoi.com/shop/

entry.title: The Brutal Bombing of Hanoi | Vietnam War from a North Vietnamese Perspective
entry.summary:
Over 12 days in 1972, the USA mercilessly bombed Hanoi in what the USA called "the Christmas Bombing" and what the Vietnamese call "the Battle of Dien Bien Phu in the Air." Throughout this relentless terror attack, the people of North Vietnam - soldiers and citizens alike - demonstrated the incredible resilience and a fighting spirit which eventually led to the victory of North Vietnam over the Southern puppet government. In this documentary, we will take a closer look at this tragic chapter of the Vietnam War from a North Vietnamese perspective.
International Magazine: https://internationalmagz.com/magazine/
Means TV: https://www.means.tv/
Credits: Nguyễn Thị Bích Hà voiced by Professor Flowers: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGZrqXTq3GW2wNRz9M44Baw
Hanoi Cafe Owner voiced by Holly of Silver Spook Games: https://www.youtube.com/user/twiliteminotaur
Nguyễn Vân Cầu Voiced by Emerican Johnson of NonCompete: https://www.youtube.com/noncompete/
Related Videos: How my mom survived being bombed by the US: https://youtu.be/x5xaWssOB4A
Phu Quoc Island Prison for communists in Vietnam: https://youtu.be/sP22K6dog34
Support me on Patreon and Comradery: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/ https://www.patreon.com/lunaoi/

entry.title: VIETNAM and LAOS: Comrades in Socialism FOREVER!
entry.summary:
Vietnam and Laos have been comrades for nearly a century, and our friendship grows stronger as time goes on! In this video, we will explore the history of our revolutionary struggle, fighting imperialism side-by-side in the march towards liberation!
My interview with my dad: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=taDiYqwQZdg

entry.title: Revolutionary Women WARRIORS of Vietnam
entry.summary:
Western media has been portraying revolutionary Vietnamese women as nothing more than Vietnamese "war propaganda." They claim that women had no power during our struggle for liberation.
This video will debunk this racist and sexist Western perspective by sharing with you the true stories of 10 BAD ASS WOMEN from Vietnamese history!
Support me on Comradery, a cooperative anti-capitalist Patreon alternative: https://www.comradery.co/lunaoi/
